commands.review_summary:
This PR passes `displaySeconds: true` through inbound envelope timestamp formatting and updates envelope plus WhatsApp helper tests for second-precision output.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests 0. Total +4 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence path: current main routes inbound conversation timestamps through `formatEnvelopeTimestamp`, which calls the formatters without `displaySeconds`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and must not create artifacts.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor action for stale inbound metadata tests and real behavior proof; automation should not replace the contributor's real-environment evidence.

target.title: fix(inbound-meta): include seconds in timestamps
target.body:
## Summary
- Include seconds in inbound metadata envelope timestamps while preserving UTC, local, and configured timezone handling.
- Update the shared plugin test helper so extension tests expect the same timestamp precision.
- Add focused regression coverage for second-precision metadata timestamps.

Fixes #87257

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/envelope.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.e2e.config.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply.web-auto-reply.connection-and-logging.e2e.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/reply/session.test.ts -t "applies WhatsApp group reset authorization"`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/auto-reply/envelope.ts src/auto-reply/envelope.test.ts src/plugin-sdk/test-helpers/envelope-timestamp.ts extensions/whatsapp/src/auto-reply.web-auto-reply.connection-and-logging.e2e.test.ts`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Inbound metadata timestamps now include second precision instead of stopping at minutes.
Real environment tested: Local macOS source checkout rebased onto the latest upstream main at PR creation time.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Ran the verification commands listed above after rebasing.
Evidence after fix: Formatter tests assert `2025-01-02T03:04:05Z` and timezone output with `04:04:05`; the WhatsApp helper regression asserts `16:00:00 PST`.
Observed result after fix: All targeted tests and formatting checks passed.
What was not tested: Full repository test suite was not run.
target.author: garlicgo
